behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names build.rs path (crates/uv-cli/build.rs), commit_info function, .jj directory, git_head, Command::new("git"), UV_COMMIT_*, cargo:rerun-if-changed, and CLAUDE.md rules all asserted in tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to check (.jj existence, return early) but doesn't provide exact code; agent must still decide placement and implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for .jj reference + existence check + early-return-or-negation-guard before git ops, accepting multiple equivalent patterns (exists/is_dir/try_exists, return or if-guard).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run cargo fmt, clippy, check via subprocess in addition to AST checks on build.rs.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_jj_early_return enforces ordering (.jj before git ops) and guard presence; a stub commit_info would fail test_not_stub and git_functionality_preserved.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All instruction requirements (jj check, early return, preserving git_head/Command/UV_COMMIT/rerun, CLAUDE.md rules) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section headers (pass_to_pass, fail_to_pass, anti-stub, config-derived) with clear docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies Rust build script, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers (crates/uv-cli/build.rs, commit_info, UV_COMMIT) are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file/function because the bug is localized there by the task domain; no line numbers or exact code given.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
